title: Doff Ant Killer 300g + 33% Extra Free | Dusting Powder | Ready-to-Use Formula for Ants, Woodlice, Cockroaches & More | Indoor & Outdoor Use | Long-Lasting Protection Up to 3 Months
features: READY-TO-USE POWDER: The formula is convenient and doesn't require mixing, making application quick and easy.
MULTIPLE PEST CONTROL: Effectively kills ants, their nests, and other crawling insects such as woodlice, earwigs, and cockroaches.
LONG-LASTING PROTECTION: Provides up to 3 months of continuous pest control, keeping your home insect-free.
INDOOR AND OUTDOOR USE: Ideal for use in a variety of environments, including both inside the home and in gardens.
EASY APPLICATION: Simply sprinkle the powder in affected areas, making it efficient and mess-free.
